title: Portfolio Website
tagline: A case-study driven portfolio built with Angular
overview: A modern, dark-mode portfolio showcasing projects as detailed case studies.
problem: Most portfolios just list projects with screenshots. Hiring managers want to understand your thinking.
solution: Designed a case-study format that walks through problem, solution, and outcomes for each project.
outcome: Increased interview callbacks by focusing on storytelling over aesthetics.

title: Task Manager App
tagline: A full-stack productivity tool with real-time sync
overview: A drag-and-drop task management app with team collaboration features.
problem: Existing tools were either too complex (Jira) or too simple (sticky notes) for small teams.
solution: Built a middle-ground tool with kanban boards, priorities, and real-time updates via WebSockets.
outcome: Used by a 6-person startup team daily. Reduced missed deadlines by 40%.
